ogTitle: Widgeegoara vs Wights Mountain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Widgeegoara and Wights Mountain.
heading: Widgeegoara vs Wights Mountain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Widgeegoara, Queensland and Wights Mountain, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Widgeegoara has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wights Mountain (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Widgeegoara or Wights Mountain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Widgeegoara has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Wights Mountain scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Widgeegoara scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Wights Mountain scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Widgeegoara or Wights Mountain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Widgeegoara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
